query:
SELECT qi.id, qi.itemData
FROM quote_items qi
JOIN quote_versions qv ON qi.versionId = qv.id
JOIN quotes q ON qv.quoteId = q.id
WHERE q.quoteNumber = '33.0056-26'
LIMIT 3;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4QE1i3LPsxu4CUm.root --database emCAipNpTbMAUBXoZXdNuB --execute

JOIN quote_versions qv ON qi.versionId = qv.id
JOIN quotes q ON qv.quoteId = q.id
WHERE q.quoteNumber = '33.0056-26'
